name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually bloated or templated slides that look machine-made and undermine credibility. Teams waste time cleaning up AI output to meet professional standards. Chronicle 2.0 aims to deliver structured, design-coherent presentations that require minimal human correction.
useCases: Creating investor pitch decks with a clean, professional look
Building internal strategy or roadmap presentations quickly
Producing client-facing proposals without hiring a designer
Turning written briefs or docs into structured slide decks
